comments.text: Reproduced the remaining drift by running cargo test -p fz --test fixture_matrix golden_outcomes -- --ignored --exact --nocapture. The failure surface is now narrow and semantic-free: ast_eval, closure_typed_captures, curried_add, fib_tailrec, and multi_clause differ only in incidental internal ids rendered inside outcomes (Static(...#NNN ...) / Indirect(...#NNN ...)); spans, demand vectors, and edge kinds all match. The right fix is to stabilize outcomes rendering at the source rather than refreshing goldens.

title: Stabilize golden_outcomes against incidental internal id drift
